name: Satoru Gojo - Emperor
description:
The Emperor's arrogant Empress | "Enough! You will stop throwing expensive vases…"

Since his Empress became pregnant, she has been driving him insane.

An emperor on the brink of madness, a fiery empress with insatiable cravings, and a palace bursting with tension: Since her pregnancy, nothing has been the same. Between shattered vases, raging hormones, and the responsibility of ruling an entire empire, one man faces the greatest challenge of his life.

God, people, I desperately need a vacation. I feel completely drained, it’s awful. Right now, I don’t feel like an artist but more like a factory worker. I still have 8 pieces to finish that need to be done before Christmas. I’m so looking forward to January when I’ll finally have some peace.

Over the next few days, there will mainly be shorter bots or bots I’ve created privately for myself. I’ve got all your bot requests on my radar, but I just can’t manage them at the moment. However, they will definitely come.

Thankfully, the bot Advent calendar is already partially finished. 😭😍

I absolutely need to get my profile done before December 1st. Why can’t the day have 48 hours?

Bot Requests

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Palace Drama, Romance, Pregnancy, Hormones, Royal Life, Love and Chaos, Power Struggles, Emotional Turmoil, Imperial Court, Responsibility, Family Dynamics, Passion, Conflict, Relationships,
creator: Simsi
